# Auto-generated 1.18.2 compatibility for effix.
# Missing vanilla MIO definitions/templates referenced by copied 1.18 content.

# From common\military_industrial_organization\organizations\COG_organization.txt

COG_explosifs_congo_organization = {
	include = generic_support_equipment_organization
	icon = GFX_idea_societe_africain_de_explosifes
	allowed = { 
		tag = COG
		has_dlc = "Gotterdammerung"
	}

	available = {
		FROM = {
			has_completed_focus = COG_societe_africaine_dexplosifs_congo
		}
	}

	initial_trait = {
		name = HUN_mio_trait_army_ammunition_and_wepaons_works
		
		limit_to_equipment_type = { 
			infantry_equipment 
		}
		
		equipment_bonus = {
			reliability = 0.05
			breakthrough = 0.03
		}

		production_bonus = {
			production_cost_factor = -0.1
		}
	}

}

# From common\military_industrial_organization\organizations\CZE_organization.txt

CZE_automatic_weapons_equipment_organization = { #Based on CZ Uhersky Brod
	icon = GFX_idea_generic_infantry_equipment_manufacturer_2

	allowed = {
		always = no # Archetype only - countries using it have their own verisons
	}

	equipment_type = {
		infantry_equipment
		mio_cat_eq_only_light_fighter
		mio_cat_eq_only_strategic_bomber
	}

	research_categories = { 
		infantry_weapons 
		cat_air_guns
	}

	tree_header_text = {
		text = mio_header_design_and_production
		x = 2
	}

	tree_header_text = {
		text = mio_header_aircraft_weapons
		x = 7
	}

	initial_trait = {
		name = CZE_mio_initial_trait_automatic_manufacturer
		token = CZE_mio_initial_trait_automatic_manufacturer_token

		limit_to_equipment_type = { 
			infantry_equipment
		}

		organization_modifier = {
			military_industrial_organization_research_bonus = 0.05
		}

		production_bonus = {
			production_efficiency_gain_factor = 0.03
		}

		equipment_bonus = {
			breakthrough = 0.03
			hard_attack = 0.01
			reliability = -0.03
		}
	}

	trait = {
		token = CZE_mio_trait_drum_mags
		name = CZE_mio_trait_drum_mags
		icon = GFX_generic_mio_trait_icon_sub_attack

		position = { x=1 y=0 }

		mutually_exclusive = { CZE_mio_trait_box_mags }

		limit_to_equipment_type = { infantry_equipment }

		equipment_bonus = {
			hard_attack = 0.02
			breakthrough = 0.05
			reliability = -0.05
			build_cost_ic = 0.05
		}
	}

	trait = {
		token = CZE_mio_trait_box_mags
		name = CZE_mio_trait_box_mags
		icon = GFX_generic_mio_trait_icon_supply_consumption

		position = { x=3 y=0 }

		mutually_exclusive = { CZE_mio_trait_drum_mags }

		limit_to_equipment_type = { infantry_equipment }

		equipment_bonus = {
			reliability = 0.03
			build_cost_ic = -0.02
		}
	}

	trait = {
		token = CZE_mio_trait_9_mm
		name = CZE_mio_trait_9_mm
		icon = GFX_generic_mio_department_icon_infantry_quality

		position = { x=0 y=1 }

		any_parent = { CZE_mio_trait_drum_mags CZE_mio_trait_box_mags }

		mutually_exclusive = { CZE_mio_trait_larger_calibers }

		limit_to_equipment_type = { infantry_equipment }

		equipment_bonus = {
			soft_attack = 0.02
		}

		production_bonus = {
			production_resource_penalty_factor = -0.05
		}
	}

	trait = {
		token = CZE_mio_trait_larger_calibers 
		name = CZE_mio_trait_larger_calibers
		icon = GFX_generic_mio_department_icon_infantry_offense

		position = { x=2 y=1 }
		relative_position_id = CZE_mio_trait_drum_mags

		any_parent = { CZE_mio_trait_drum_mags CZE_mio_trait_box_mags }

		mutually_exclusive = { CZE_mio_trait_9_mm }

		limit_to_equipment_type = { infantry_equipment }

		equipment_bonus = {
			soft_attack = 0.03
			hard_attack = 0.05
			build_cost_ic = 0.05
		}
	}


	trait = {
		token = CZE_mio_trait_maintain_current_firing_mechanism  
		name = CZE_mio_trait_maintain_current_firing_mechanism 
		icon = GFX_generic_mio_department_icon_infantry_technology

		position = { x=0 y=1 }
		relative_position_id = CZE_mio_trait_9_mm

		any_parent = { CZE_mio_trait_larger_calibers CZE_mio_trait_9_mm }

		mutually_exclusive = { CZE_mio_trait_simplified_firing_mechanisms   }

		limit_to_equipment_type = { infantry_equipment }

		equipment_bonus = {
			defense = 0.03
		}

		production_bonus = {
			production_efficiency_cap_factor = 0.03
			production_efficiency_gain_factor = -0.03
		}
	}

	
	trait = {
		token = CZE_mio_trait_simplified_firing_mechanisms  
		name = CZE_mio_trait_simplified_firing_mechanisms  
		icon = GFX_generic_mio_department_icon_infantry_line_efficiency

		position = { x=2 y=1 }
		relative_position_id = CZE_mio_trait_9_mm

		any_parent = { CZE_mio_trait_larger_calibers CZE_mio_trait_9_mm }

		mutually_exclusive = { CZE_mio_trait_maintain_current_firing_mechanism  }

		limit_to_equipment_type = { infantry_equipment }

		production_bonus = {
			production_efficiency_gain_factor = 0.03
			#production_resource_penalty_factor = -0.03
		}

			reliability = 0.03
			soft_attack = 0.02
		}

# From common\military_industrial_organization\organizations\CZE_organization.txt
CZE_tank_destroyer_organization = { #Based on Skoda Armor - Plezn 
	icon = GFX_idea_generic_tank_manufacturer_3

	allowed = {
		always = no # Archetype only - countries using it have their own verisons
	}

	equipment_type = { light_tank_destroyer_chassis medium_tank_destroyer_chassis heavy_tank_destroyer_chassis }
	research_categories = { mio_cat_tech_all_armor_and_modules cat_anti_tank  }

	tree_header_text = {
		text = mio_header_light_tank_destroyers_department
		x = 1
	}

	tree_header_text = {
		text = mio_header_medium_tank_destroyers_department
		x = 4.2
	}

	tree_header_text = {
		text = mio_header_heavy_tank_destroyers_department
		x = 7.1
	}

	initial_trait = {
		name = CZE_mio_trait_initial_trait_tank_destroyer_guns_organization
		
		limit_to_equipment_type = { 
			light_tank_destroyer_chassis medium_tank_destroyer_chassis heavy_tank_destroyer_chassis
		}
		
		equipment_bonus = {
			hard_attack = 0.10
			armor_value = 0.05
		}
	}


	trait = {
		token = CZE_mio_trait_mobile_tank_destroyers
		name = CZE_mio_trait_mobile_tank_destroyers
		icon = GFX_generic_mio_department_icon_tank_light_tank_at

		position = { x = 1 y = 0 }
		
		limit_to_equipment_type = { light_tank_destroyer_chassis }

		equipment_bonus = {
			hard_attack = 0.05
			maximum_speed = 0.15
		}
	}

	trait = {
		token = CZE_mio_trait_light_tank_destroyer_artillery_gun_combo
		name = CZE_mio_trait_light_tank_destroyer_artillery_gun_combo
		icon = GFX_generic_mio_department_icon_tank_light_tank_spg
		
		position = { x = -1  y = 2 }

		relative_position_id = CZE_mio_trait_mobile_tank_destroyers
		
		all_parents = { CZE_mio_trait_mobile_tank_destroyers }

		mutually_exclusive = { CZE_mio_trait_light_tank_destroyer_gun_improved_muzzle_breaks }

		limit_to_equipment_type = { light_tank_destroyer_chassis }

		equipment_bonus = {
			breakthrough = 0.05
			soft_attack = 0.15
		}
	}

	trait = {
		token = CZE_mio_trait_light_tank_destroyer_gun_improved_muzzle_breaks
		name = CZE_mio_trait_light_tank_destroyer_gun_improved_muzzle_breaks
		icon = GFX_generic_mio_trait_icon_ap_attack
				
		position = { x = 1  y = 2 }

		relative_position_id = CZE_mio_trait_mobile_tank_destroyers
		
		all_parents = { CZE_mio_trait_mobile_tank_destroyers }

		mutually_exclusive = { CZE_mio_trait_light_tank_destroyer_artillery_gun_combo }

		limit_to_equipment_type = { light_tank_destroyer_chassis }

		equipment_bonus = {
			reliability = 0.05
			ap_attack = 0.15
		}
	}

	trait = {
		token = CZE_mio_trait_multi_purpose_ammunition_tank_destoryer 
		name = CZE_mio_trait_multi_purpose_ammunition_tank_destoryer 
		icon = GFX_generic_mio_department_icon_tank_light_tank_weapons
		
		position = { x = 0  y = 1 }

		relative_position_id = CZE_mio_trait_mobile_tank_destroyers
		
		all_parents = { CZE_mio_trait_mobile_tank_destroyers }

		#mutually_exclusive = { CZE_mio_trait_light_tank_destroyer_artillery_gun_combo }

		limit_to_equipment_type = { light_tank_destroyer_chassis }

		equipment_bonus = {
			hard_attack = 0.05
			soft_attack = 0.05
		}
	}

	trait = {
		token = CZE_mio_trait_medium_tank_hunters_tank_destoryer
		name = CZE_mio_trait_medium_tank_hunters_tank_destoryer
		icon = GFX_generic_mio_department_icon_tank_medium_tank_at
		
		position = { x = 3 y = 0 }

		relative_position_id = CZE_mio_trait_mobile_tank_destroyers
		
		#all_parents = { CZE_mio_trait_mobile_tank_destroyers }

		#mutually_exclusive = { CZE_mio_trait_light_tank_destroyer_gun_improved_muzzle_breaks }

		equipment_bonus = {
			maximum_speed = 0.05
			ap_attack = 0.05
			defense = 0.05
		}
	}

		token = CZE_mio_trait_low_profile_ambushers_tank_destoryer
		name = CZE_mio_trait_low_profile_ambushers_tank_destoryer
		icon = GFX_generic_mio_trait_icon_defense

		position = { x = -1 y = 1 }
		relative_position_id = CZE_mio_trait_medium_tank_hunters_tank_destoryer

		any_parent = { CZE_mio_trait_medium_tank_hunters_tank_destoryer CZE_mio_trait_mobile_tank_destroyers }

			defense = 0.05
		}
		
		production_bonus = {
			production_resource_penalty_factor = -0.10
		}
	}

	trait = {
		token = CZE_mio_trait_armor_reinforced_sloped_armor_tank_destroyer
		name = CZE_mio_trait_armor_reinforced_sloped_armor_tank_destroyer
		icon = GFX_generic_mio_department_icon_tank_general_armor

		position = { x = 1 y = 1 }
		relative_position_id = CZE_mio_trait_medium_tank_hunters_tank_destoryer

		any_parent = { CZE_mio_trait_medium_tank_hunters_tank_destoryer CZE_mio_trait_heavy_mobile_siege_cannons }

		mutually_exclusive = { CZE_mio_trait_low_profile_ambushers_tank_destoryer }
		
		equipment_bonus = {
			defense = 0.05
			armor_value = 0.1
		}
	}

	trait = {
		token = CZE_mio_trait_rear_and_low_ammo_compartment_tank_destroyer
		name = CZE_mio_trait_rear_and_low_ammo_compartment_tank_destroyer
		icon = GFX_generic_mio_department_icon_tank_medium_tank_weapons

		position = { x = 1 y = 1 }
		relative_position_id = CZE_mio_trait_low_profile_ambushers_tank_destoryer

		any_parent = { CZE_mio_trait_low_profile_ambushers_tank_destoryer CZE_mio_trait_armor_reinforced_sloped_armor_tank_destroyer }

		#	production_resource_penalty_factor = -0.15
		#}

		equipment_bonus = {
			defense = 0.05
			breakthrough = 0.05
			reliability = 0.1
		}
	}
	
	trait = {
		token = CZE_mio_trait_medium_tank_destroyer_extended_barrel_length
		name = CZE_mio_trait_medium_tank_destroyer_extended_barrel_length
		icon = GFX_generic_mio_department_icon_tank_heavy_tank_production

		position = { x = 2 y = 2 }
		relative_position_id = CZE_mio_trait_medium_tank_hunters_tank_destoryer

		any_parent = { CZE_mio_trait_medium_tank_hunters_tank_destoryer CZE_mio_trait_heavy_mobile_siege_cannons }

		#mutually_exclusive = { CZE_mio_trait_armor_reinforced_sloped_armor_tank_destroyer }
		
		#production_bonus = {
		#	production_resource_penalty_factor = -0.15
		#}

		equipment_bonus = {
			ap_attack = 0.05
			soft_attack = 0.05
			reliability = -0.05
			breakthrough = 0.05
		}

			maximum_speed = -0.1
			ap_attack = 0.25
		}

			armor_value = 0.05
			defense = 0.05
		}
	}

	trait = {
		token = CZE_mio_trait_tank_destroyer_gun_improved_tracks
		name = generic_mio_trait_assault_gun_improved_tracks
		icon = GFX_generic_mio_department_icon_tank_general_engine

		position = { x = 1 y = 2 }
		relative_position_id = CZE_mio_trait_heavy_mobile_siege_cannons

		all_parents = { CZE_mio_trait_heavy_mobile_siege_cannons }

		limit_to_equipment_type = { heavy_tank_destroyer_chassis }
		
		equipment_bonus = {
			maximum_speed = 0.1
			reliability = 0.05
		}
	}

	trait = {
		token = CZE_mio_trait_medium_tank_destroyer_gun_high_velocity_rounds
		name = CZE_mio_trait_medium_tank_destroyer_gun_high_velocity_rounds
		icon = GFX_generic_mio_department_icon_tank_general_weapons 

		position = { x = 0 y = 1 }
		relative_position_id = CZE_mio_trait_rear_and_low_ammo_compartment_tank_destroyer

		all_parents = { CZE_mio_trait_rear_and_low_ammo_compartment_tank_destroyer }

		available = {
			owner = {
				has_tech = antitank2
			}
		}

		#mutually_exclusive = { CZE_mio_trait_armor_reinforced_sloped_armor_tank_destroyer }
		
		#production_bonus = {
		#	production_resource_penalty_factor = -0.15
		#}

		limit_to_equipment_type = { medium_tank_destroyer_chassis }

		equipment_bonus = {
			breakthrough = 0.15
			ap_attack = 0.15
			reliability = -0.1
		}
	}
}

# From common\military_industrial_organization\organizations\CZE_organization.txt

CZE_zbrojovka_vsetin_organization = {
	include = generic_support_equipment_organization
	icon = GFX_idea_CZE_zbrojovka_vsetin
	allowed = {
		has_dlc = "Peace For Our Time"
		OR = {
			tag = CZE
			tag = POL
			tag = RKH
		}
	}

	available = {
		FROM = {
			if = {
				limit = {
					original_tag = POL
				}
				has_completed_focus = POL_join_CZE_industry
				OR = {
					controls_state = 9
					any_subject_country = {
						controls_state = 9
					}	
				}
			}
		}
	}

	visible = {
		FROM = {
			if = {
				limit = {
					original_tag = POL
				}
				has_completed_focus = POL_join_CZE_industry
			}
		}
	}

	add_trait = {
		token = CZE_mio_trait_bata_corporation
		name = CZE_bata_corporation_name
		icon = GFX_generic_mio_department_icon_facilities
		special_trait_background = yes

		position = { x=9 y=0 }

		visible = {
			FROM = { 
				original_tag = CZE
				has_dlc = "Peace For Our Time"
			}
		}

		available = {
			FROM = {
				has_completed_focus = CZE_diversify_bata
				NOT = { has_country_flag = CZE_mio_trait_bata_corporation_taken_flag }
			}
		}

		on_complete = {
			custom_effect_tooltip = generic_trait_will_not_be_available_in_other_organizations
			FROM = {
				set_country_flag = CZE_mio_trait_bata_corporation_taken_flag
			}
		}

		production_bonus = {
			production_resource_penalty_factor = -0.10
			production_resource_need_factor = -0.10
		}

		ai_will_do = {
			base = 2
		}
	}
}

# From common\military_industrial_organization\organizations\DEN_organization.txt

DEN_burmeister_wain_organization = {
    include = generic_task_force_ship_organization
    icon = GFX_idea_DEN_burmeister_wain_organization
    allowed = { 
        tag = DEN
        has_dlc = "Arms Against Tyranny"
    } 

    tree_header_text = {
        text = mio_header_systems
        x = 1
    }

    tree_header_text = {
        text = mio_header_weapons
        x = 4
    }

    tree_header_text = {
        text = mio_header_production
        x = 7.5
    }

    override_trait = {
        token = generic_mio_trait_secondary_fire_director_control
        position = { x=4 y=0 }
    }

    override_trait = {
        token = generic_mio_trait_primary_fire_director_control
        position = { x=2 y=0 }
    }


    add_trait = { 
        token = DEN_mio_trait_coastal_defense_ship_modernization
        name = DEN_mio_trait_coastal_defense_ship_modernization
        icon = GFX_generic_mio_department_icon_ship_general
        special_trait_background = yes

        position = { x=1.5 y=0 }
        relative_position_id = generic_mio_trait_primary_fire_director_control

        
        limit_to_equipment_type = { ship_hull_cruiser_coastal_defense_ship }

        visible = {
            owner = {
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
        }

        equipment_bonus = {
            naval_speed = 0.05
            fuel_consumption = -0.05
        }

        production_bonus = {
            production_cost_factor = -0.1
            production_resource_need_factor = -0.05
            production_conversion_speed_factor = 0.1
        }
    }

    add_trait = { 
        token = DEN_mio_trait_engine_optimization
        name = generic_mio_engine_optimization
        icon = GFX_generic_mio_trait_icon_naval_speed
        special_trait_background = yes

        position = { x=2.5 y=0 }
        relative_position_id = generic_mio_trait_primary_fire_director_control

        equipment_bonus = {
            fuel_consumption = -0.02
            naval_speed = 0.02
            naval_range = 0.02
        }
    }

    add_trait = { 
        token = DEN_mio_trait_refit_civilian_ships
        name = generic_mio_trait_efficient_scrap_recycling
        icon = GFX_generic_mio_department_icon_ship_general_conversion
        special_trait_background = yes

        all_parents = {
            DEN_mio_trait_engine_optimization
        }

        position = { x=-1 y=1 }
        relative_position_id = DEN_mio_trait_engine_optimization

        available = {
            owner = {
                has_completed_focus = DEN_refit_civilian_ships
            }
        }

        production_bonus = {
            production_conversion_speed_factor = 0.1
            production_resource_need_factor = -0.05
        }
    }

    add_trait = { 
        token = DEN_mio_trait_ship_efficient_scrap_recycling
        name = generic_mio_trait_efficient_scrap_recycling
        icon = GFX_generic_mio_department_icon_ship_general_production
        special_trait_background = yes

        all_parents = {
            DEN_mio_trait_engine_optimization
        }

        position = { x=0 y=1 }
        relative_position_id = DEN_mio_trait_engine_optimization

        production_bonus = {
            production_cost_factor = -0.05
            production_capacity_factor = 0.05
            production_resource_penalty_factor = -0.05
        }
    }
}

# From common\military_industrial_organization\organizations\DEN_organization.txt

DEN_flyvemaskinevaerksted_organization = {
    include = generic_naval_aircraft_organization
    icon = GFX_idea_DEN_flyvemaskinevaerksted_organization
    allowed = { 
        tag = DEN
        has_dlc = "Arms Against Tyranny"
    } 

    override_trait = {
        token = generic_mio_trait_internal_torpedo_mountings
        position = { x=1 y=0 }
    }

    add_trait = { 
        token = DEN_mio_trait_sub_detection
        name = generic_mio_trait_submarine_hunters
        icon = GFX_generic_mio_trait_icon_sub_detection
        special_trait_background = yes

        all_parents = {
            generic_mio_trait_navigation_equipment
        }

        position = { x=-2 y=1 }
        relative_position_id = generic_mio_trait_navigation_equipment

        mutually_exclusive = { DEN_mio_trait_naval_detection }

        available = {
            owner = {
                has_completed_focus = DEN_flyveskolen
            }
        }

        equipment_bonus = {
            sub_detection = 0.05
            naval_strike_attack = 0.05
            naval_strike_targetting = 0.05
        }
    }
    
    add_trait = { 
        token = DEN_mio_trait_naval_detection
        name = generic_mio_trait_naval_strike
        icon = GFX_generic_mio_department_icon_plane_naval_bomber
        special_trait_background = yes

        all_parents = {
            generic_mio_trait_navigation_equipment
        }

        position = { x=-1 y=1 }
        relative_position_id = generic_mio_trait_navigation_equipment

        mutually_exclusive = { DEN_mio_trait_sub_detection }

        available = {
            owner = {
                has_completed_focus = DEN_flyveskolen
            }
        }

        equipment_bonus = {
            surface_detection = 0.05
            naval_strike_attack = 0.05
            naval_strike_targetting = 0.05
        }
    }

    add_trait = { 
        token = DEN_mio_trait_standardized_production_flyvemaskinevaerksted
        name = generic_mio_initial_trait_standardized_production
        icon = GFX_generic_mio_department_icon_plane_general_line_efficiency
        special_trait_background = yes

        position = { x=1 y=1 }
        relative_position_id = generic_mio_trait_navigation_equipment
        
        any_parent = { generic_mio_trait_navigation_equipment }
        
        available = {
            owner = {
                has_completed_focus = DEN_unify_flyvevabnet
            }
        }

        production_bonus = {
            production_capacity_factor = 0.05
            production_efficiency_cap_factor = 0.05
            production_efficiency_gain_factor = 0.05
        }
    }
}

# From common\military_industrial_organization\organizations\DEN_organization.txt

DEN_flyvertroppernes_organization = {
    include = generic_multi_role_aircraft_organization
    icon = GFX_idea_DEN_flyvertroppernes_organization
    allowed = { 
        tag = DEN
        has_dlc = "Arms Against Tyranny"
    } 

    tree_header_text = {
        text = mio_header_light_aircraft
        x = 2
    }

    tree_header_text = {
        text = mio_header_medium_aircraft
        x = 6
    }

    tree_header_text = {
        text = mio_header_equipment_and_specialization
        x = 4
    }

    override_trait = {
        token = generic_mio_trait_armored_cockpit
        position = { x=2 y=0 }
    }

    override_trait = {
        token = generic_mio_trait_escort_designs
        position = { x=4 y=0 }
    }

    override_trait = {
        token = generic_mio_trait_not_enough_guns_never_enough_guns
        position = { x=2 y=0 }
    }

    add_trait = { 
        token = DEN_mio_trait_fighter_specialization
        name = generic_mio_trait_fighter_aircraft_specialists
        icon = GFX_generic_mio_department_icon_plane_fighter
        special_trait_background = yes

        position = { x=1 y=0 }
        relative_position_id = generic_mio_trait_armored_cockpit

        mutually_exclusive = { DEN_mio_trait_cas_specialization }

        limit_to_equipment_type = { mio_cat_eq_all_small_plane mio_cat_eq_all_medium_plane }

        equipment_bonus = {
            air_superiority = 0.05
            air_agility = 0.05
            air_attack = 0.05
        }
    }

    add_trait = { 
        token = DEN_mio_trait_cas_specialization
        name = generic_mio_trait_close_air_support_specialization
        icon = GFX_generic_mio_department_icon_plane_cv_cas
        special_trait_background = yes

        position = { x=3 y=0 }
        relative_position_id = generic_mio_trait_armored_cockpit

        mutually_exclusive = { DEN_mio_trait_fighter_specialization }      

        limit_to_equipment_type = { mio_cat_eq_all_small_plane mio_cat_eq_all_medium_plane }  

        equipment_bonus = {
            air_ground_attack = 0.05
            air_agility = 0.05
            air_defence = 0.05
        }
    }

    add_trait = { 
        token = DEN_mio_trait_standardized_production_flyvertroppernes
        name = generic_mio_initial_trait_standardized_production
        icon = GFX_generic_mio_department_icon_plane_general_line_efficiency
        special_trait_background = yes

        position = { x=1 y=0 }
        relative_position_id = generic_mio_trait_upgraded_engines
        
        any_parent = { generic_mio_trait_light_airframe generic_mio_trait_medium_airframe }
        
        available = {
            owner = {
                has_completed_focus = DEN_unify_flyvevabnet
            }
        }

        production_bonus = {
            production_capacity_factor = 0.05
            production_efficiency_cap_factor = 0.05
            production_efficiency_gain_factor = 0.05
        }
    }
}

# From common\military_industrial_organization\organizations\DEN_organization.txt

DEN_orlogsvaerftet_organization = {
    include = generic_raider_ship_organization
    icon = GFX_idea_DEN_orlogsvaerftet_organization
    allowed = { 
        tag = DEN
        has_dlc = "Arms Against Tyranny"
    }

    tree_header_text = {
        text = mio_header_long_range_focus
        x = 1
    }

    tree_header_text = {
        text = mio_header_high_speed_focus
        x = 5
    }

    tree_header_text = {
        text = mio_header_production
        x = 7.5
    }

    override_trait = {
        token = generic_mio_trait_high_speed_raiding
        position = { x=4 y=0 }
    }

    override_trait = {
        token = generic_mio_trait_raiding_capital_ships
        position = { x=0 y=2 }
    }

    override_trait = {
        token = generic_mio_trait_raider_escort_requirements
        position = { x=0 y=1 }
    }

    override_trait = {
        token = generic_mio_trait_unescorted_raider_requirements
        position = { x=2 y=1 }
    }

    override_trait = {
        token = generic_mio_trait_raiding_cruisers
        position = { x=-2 y=2 }
    }

    add_trait = { 
        token = DEN_mio_trait_burmeister_wain_engines
        name = DEN_mio_trait_burmeister_wain_engines
        icon = GFX_generic_mio_trait_icon_naval_speed
        special_trait_background = yes

        position = { x=1 y=1 }
        relative_position_id = generic_mio_trait_long_range_raiding

        any_parent = { generic_mio_trait_long_range_raiding generic_mio_trait_high_speed_raiding }
        
        available = {
            owner = {
                has_completed_focus = DEN_modernize_the_navy
            }
        }

        equipment_bonus = {
            naval_range = 0.05
            naval_speed = 0.05
            fuel_consumption = -0.05
        }
    }

    add_trait = { 
        token = DEN_mio_trait_submarine_hunters
        name = generic_mio_trait_submarine_hunters
        icon = GFX_generic_mio_trait_icon_sub_attack
        special_trait_background = yes

        position = { x=3 y=1 }
        relative_position_id = generic_mio_trait_long_range_raiding

        any_parent = { generic_mio_trait_long_range_raiding generic_mio_trait_high_speed_raiding }

        equipment_bonus = {
            sub_detection = 0.05
            sub_attack = 0.05
            mines_sweeping = 0.05

        }
    }

    add_trait = { 
        token = DEN_mio_trait_ship_production
        name = generic_mio_trait_expanded_production_facilities
        icon = GFX_generic_mio_department_icon_ship_general_production
        special_trait_background = yes

        position = { x=7 y=0 }
        relative_position_id = generic_mio_trait_long_range_raiding

        available = {
            owner = {
                has_completed_focus = DEN_appropriate_odense_staalskibsvaerft
            }
        }

        production_bonus = {
            production_cost_factor = -0.05
            production_capacity_factor = 0.05
            production_resource_penalty_factor = -0.05
        }
    }

}

# From common\military_industrial_organization\organizations\00_generic_organization.txt
generic_train_organization = {
	icon = GFX_idea_generic_build_infrastructure

	allowed = {
		always = no # Archetype only - countries using it have their own verisons
	}

	equipment_type = { train_equipment railway_gun_equipment support_equipment }
	research_categories = { train_tech }

	tree_header_text = {
		text = mio_header_design_and_production
		x = 4
	}

	tree_header_text = {
		text = mio_header_support
		x = 1
	}

	tree_header_text = {
		text = mio_header_weapons
		x = 7
	}

	initial_trait = {
		name = generic_mio_initial_trait_generic_train_manufacturer
		limit_to_equipment_type = { 
			train_equipment 
		}

		production_bonus = {
			production_efficiency_cap_factor = 0.05
		}

		organization_modifier = {
			military_industrial_organization_research_bonus = 0.10
		}
	}

	trait = {
		token = generic_mio_trait_material_improvements
		name = generic_mio_trait_material_improvements
		icon = GFX_generic_mio_trait_icon_armor_value

		position = { x=3 y=0 }

		limit_to_equipment_type = { train_equipment }

		production_bonus = {
			production_efficiency_cap_factor = 0.05
		}
	}

	trait = {
		token = generic_mio_trait_joint_stock_scheme
		name = generic_mio_trait_joint_stock_scheme
		icon = GFX_generic_mio_department_icon_facilities

		position = { x=5 y=0 }

		organization_modifier = {
			military_industrial_organization_funds_gain = 0.20
		}

		limit_to_equipment_type = { train_equipment }

		production_bonus = {
			production_efficiency_gain_factor = 0.02
		}
	}

	trait = {
		token = generic_rapid_production_upscaling
		name = generic_rapid_production_upscaling
		icon = GFX_generic_mio_trait_icon_efficiency_gain

		position = { x=1 y=1 }
		relative_position_id = generic_mio_trait_joint_stock_scheme

		limit_to_equipment_type = { train_equipment }

		all_parents = { generic_mio_trait_joint_stock_scheme }

		organization_modifier = {
			military_industrial_organization_funds_gain = 0.05
			military_industrial_organization_size_up_requirement = -0.25
		}

		production_bonus = {
			production_efficiency_gain_factor = 0.03
		}
	}

	trait = {
		token = generic_mio_trait_additional_flak_wagons
		name = generic_mio_trait_additional_flak_wagons
		icon = GFX_generic_mio_department_icon_anti_air_production

		position = { x=2 y=0 }
		relative_position_id = generic_mio_trait_joint_stock_scheme

		limit_to_equipment_type = { train_equipment }

		equipment_bonus = {
			air_attack = 0.1
		}
	}

	trait = {
		token = generic_mio_trait_improved_axle_fitting
		name = generic_mio_trait_improved_axle_fitting
		icon = GFX_generic_mio_trait_icon_production_capacity

		position = { x=1 y=1 }
		relative_position_id = generic_mio_trait_material_improvements
		
		limit_to_equipment_type = { train_equipment railway_gun_equipment }

		any_parent = { generic_mio_trait_material_improvements generic_mio_trait_joint_stock_scheme }

		production_bonus = {
			production_efficiency_gain_factor = 0.05
			production_resource_penalty_factor = -0.05
		}
	}

	trait = {
		token = generic_mio_trait_improved_wagon_design
		name = generic_mio_trait_improved_wagon_design
		icon = GFX_generic_mio_department_icon_support_production

		position = { x=-3 y=1 }
		relative_position_id = generic_mio_trait_improved_axle_fitting

		all_parents = { generic_mio_trait_improved_axle_fitting }

		limit_to_equipment_type = { support_equipment }

		equipment_bonus = {
			reliability = 0.02
		}

		production_bonus = {
			production_cost_factor = -0.03
		}
	}

	trait = {
		token = generic_mio_trait_improved_loading
		name = generic_mio_trait_improved_loading
		icon = GFX_generic_mio_department_icon_support_line_efficiency

		position = { x=0 y=1 }
		relative_position_id = generic_mio_trait_improved_wagon_design

		all_parents = { generic_mio_trait_improved_wagon_design }

		limit_to_equipment_type = { support_equipment }

		production_bonus = {
			production_efficiency_gain_factor = 0.03
		}
	}

	trait = {
		token = CZE_mio_trait_minimalist_wagon_design
		name = CZE_mio_trait_minimalist_wagon_design
		icon = GFX_generic_mio_department_icon_support_materials

		position = { x=0 y=1 }
		relative_position_id = generic_mio_trait_improved_loading

		all_parents = { generic_mio_trait_improved_loading }

		limit_to_equipment_type = { support_equipment }

		production_bonus = {
			production_resource_need_factor = -0.05
			production_resource_penalty_factor = -0.01
		}
	}

	trait = {
		token = generic_mio_trait_ugly_ducklings
		name = generic_mio_trait_ugly_ducklings
		icon = GFX_military_industrial_organization_train_equipment

		position = { x=-1 y=1 }
		relative_position_id = generic_mio_trait_improved_axle_fitting

		all_parents = { generic_mio_trait_improved_axle_fitting }

		mutually_exclusive = { generic_mio_trait_armor_plating }

		limit_to_equipment_type = { train_equipment }

		production_bonus = {
			production_cost_factor = -0.05
			production_resource_penalty_factor = -0.05
		}

		ai_will_do = {
			base = 2
		}
	}

	trait = {
		token = generic_mio_trait_armor_plating
		name = generic_mio_trait_armor_plating
		icon = GFX_generic_mio_trait_icon_defense

		position = { x=1 y=1 }
		relative_position_id = generic_mio_trait_improved_axle_fitting

		all_parents = { generic_mio_trait_improved_axle_fitting }

		mutually_exclusive = { generic_mio_trait_ugly_ducklings }

		limit_to_equipment_type = { train_equipment }

		equipment_bonus = {
			armor_value = 0.10
		}

		production_bonus = {
			production_resource_penalty_factor = 0.10
		}
	}

	trait = {
		token = generic_mio_trait_simplified_rail_carrier 
		name = generic_mio_trait_simplified_rail_carrier
		icon = GFX_generic_mio_trait_icon_build_cost_ic

		position = { x=3 y=1 }
		relative_position_id = generic_mio_trait_improved_axle_fitting

		all_parents = { generic_mio_trait_improved_axle_fitting }

		limit_to_equipment_type = { railway_gun }

		visible = {
			has_dlc = "No Step Back"
		}
		
		production_bonus = {
			production_capacity_factor = 0.10
		}
	}

	trait = {
		token = generic_mio_trait_improved_barrel_lining
		name = generic_mio_trait_improved_barrel_lining
		icon = GFX_generic_mio_department_icon_tank_general_at

		position = { x=0 y=1 }
		relative_position_id = generic_mio_trait_simplified_rail_carrier 

		any_parent = { generic_mio_trait_simplified_rail_carrier  }

		visible = {
			has_dlc = "No Step Back"
		}

		limit_to_equipment_type = { railway_gun }

		equipment_bonus = {
			reliability = 0.10
		}
	}

	trait = {
		token = generic_mio_trait_quick_design_turnarounds
		name = generic_mio_trait_quick_design_turnarounds
		icon = GFX_generic_mio_trait_icon_conversion_speed

		position = { x=0 y=2 }
		relative_position_id = generic_mio_trait_improved_axle_fitting

		any_parent = { generic_mio_trait_armor_plating generic_mio_trait_ugly_ducklings }

		limit_to_equipment_type = { train_equipment }

		organization_modifier = {
			military_industrial_organization_design_team_assign_cost = -1
			military_industrial_organization_design_team_change_cost = -1
		}

		production_bonus = {
			production_efficiency_gain_factor = 0.05
		}
	}

	trait = {
		token = generic_mio_trait_salavage_destoryed_locomotives
		name = generic_mio_trait_salavage_destoryed_locomotives
		icon = GFX_generic_mio_trait_icon_resources

		position = { x=-1 y=3 }
		relative_position_id = generic_mio_trait_improved_axle_fitting

		limit_to_equipment_type = { train_equipment }

		all_parents = { generic_mio_trait_quick_design_turnarounds }
	
		production_bonus = {
			production_resource_need_factor = -0.25
		}
	}

	trait = {
		token = generic_mio_trait_train_production_at_scale
		name = generic_mio_trait_train_production_at_scale
		icon = GFX_generic_mio_trait_icon_efficiency_gain

		limit_to_equipment_type = { train_equipment }
		
		position = { x=0 y=3 }
		relative_position_id = generic_mio_trait_improved_axle_fitting

		all_parents = { generic_mio_trait_quick_design_turnarounds }
	
		production_bonus = {
			production_capacity_factor = 0.05
		}
	}

	trait = {
		token = generic_mio_trait_machine_assembly  
		name = generic_mio_trait_machine_assembly
		icon = GFX_generic_mio_trait_icon_efficiency_cap

		position = { x=1 y=3 }
		relative_position_id = generic_mio_trait_improved_axle_fitting

		all_parents = { generic_mio_trait_quick_design_turnarounds }

		limit_to_equipment_type = { train_equipment }

		production_bonus = {
			production_efficiency_cap_factor = 0.05
		}
	}
}

# From common\military_industrial_organization\organizations\HOL_organization.txt

HOL_artillerie_inrichtingen_organization = {
	include = generic_infantry_equipment_organization
	icon = GFX_idea_artillerie_inrichtingen
	allowed = { 
		has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
		tag = HOL
	}
	available = {
		owner = { has_completed_focus = HOL_expand_the_artillerieinrichtingen }
	}
}

# From common\military_industrial_organization\organizations\HOL_organization.txt

HOL_daf_organization = {
	include = generic_motorized_mechanized_organization
	icon = GFX_idea_HOL_daf
	allowed = { 
		has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
		tag = HOL
	}
	available = {
	}
}

# From common\military_industrial_organization\organizations\HOL_organization.txt

HOL_fokker_organization = {
	include = generic_general_aircraft_organization
	icon = GFX_idea_fokker
	allowed = { 
		has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
		tag = HOL
	}
	available = {
		
	}
}
